_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Ability to export/enumerate information (e.g., users, groups) from a Domain Controller.
reference_document_element_description: Review and approve data access requests, data sharing agreements, and data use authorizations for data assets within the assigned domain.
comments: DCWF ksa intersects with WIDAI DG domain. DG-T-013 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: DG-K-010 (DG, cosine: 0.368), RC-T-006 (RC, cosine: 0.359).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 4.2/10 (raw 0.417). Shared vocabulary: [domain]. DCWF-only terms [ability, controller, enumerate, export, groups, information] vs WIDAI-only terms [access, agreements, approve, assets, assigned, authorizations] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.848 (P=0.843, R=0.853). Balanced P/R — the 11-word DCWF element and 20-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.7%). "Ability to export/enumerate information (e.g., users, groups) from a Domain Cont" and "Review and approve data access requests, data sharing agreements, and data use a" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.376 ≈ STS 0.417 (gap 0.041). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [domain] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 3.6%. Shared tokens: [domain]. DCWF-only: [ability, controller, enumerate, export, groups, information]. WIDAI-only: [access, agreements, approve, assets, assigned, authorizations].
